title: ASTARON Mini Effortless Desktop Staplers with 400 Standard 26/6 Staples, 2-24 Sheet Capacity, Includes Built-in Staple Remover, Cute Stapler Gift for Student and Office Use, 3 Colors Options
features: 【Staplers & Staples】-Included in the package is a mini stapler and a box of standard size nails (400 pcs )
【Small Size & Large Capacity】-The cute stapler is easy to carry, Labor-saving structure effectively, can hold 40 staples at a time
【High Quality Material】-The stapler set is made of ABS shell, stainless steel with fine workmanship.Bulit-in staple remover for convenient staple removal.
【Jelly colors】-We have 3 colors of stapler for you to choose. Each color is very cute and energetic. You can give them as a gift to friends or children
【Solid Building】-Great for schools, offices, and home for everyday stapling so that everyone can easily access.
description: 【ASTARON Staplers Set】 - Included in the package is a green stapler, a box of 400 staples, standard size 26/6, the stapler holds 40 staples at a time, 2-24 sheet capacity. 【NOTES】 - There are small parts in the package, please keep it out of the reach of the baby.
